name: Accounting
summary: Analyze financial records and ledgers.
description: Covers bookkeeping, auditing, budgeting, and spotting irregularities in financial documents.
notes: Useful for businesses, administrations, and fraud detection.

name: Acrobatics
summary: Balance, tumbling, and agile movement.
description: Use for flips, tightrope movement, reducing fall damage, and general athletic agility feats.
notes: Commonly paired with Climbing and Jumping.

name: Acting
summary: Convincing impersonation and emotional display.
description: Lets you fake identity, mannerisms, and emotions to deceive observers in social situations.
notes: Complementary to Disguise and Fast-Talk.

name: Administration
summary: Run offices and institutions efficiently.
description: Covers forms, procedures, logistics, and bureaucratic operations in organizations.
notes: Helpful for managing teams or red tape.

name: Animal Handling
summary: Train and control domesticated animals.
description: Use to calm, direct, and train animals accustomed to human contact.
notes: Specialty by animal class is common in play.

name: Area Knowledge
summary: Know local geography and culture.
description: Represents familiarity with places, routes, neighborhoods, and local customs in one area.
notes: Defined per specific city/region.

name: Armoury
summary: Maintain and repair weapons and armor.
description: Covers diagnosis, maintenance, and repair of military equipment.
notes: Usually specialized by equipment type.

name: Body Language
summary: Read nonverbal cues and intent.
description: Use to detect emotion, deception signs, or social dynamics from posture and expression.
notes: Requires observing the subject.

name: Climbing
summary: Ascend difficult surfaces safely.
description: Use for ladders, cliffs, walls, and improvised climbing in hazardous environments.
notes: Equipment and surface quality modify rolls.

name: Diplomacy
summary: Negotiate formal agreements peacefully.
description: Used for treaties, mediation, and official social dealings where tact and protocol matter.
notes: Slower but safer than Fast-Talk.

name: Disguise
summary: Alter appearance to avoid recognition.
description: Create convincing cosmetic changes and costumes to pass as someone else.
notes: Acting can provide complementary support.

name: Driving
summary: Operate ground vehicles.
description: Use for maneuvering, hazard response, and controlled driving under pressure.
notes: Specialty by vehicle type.

name: Fast-Talk
summary: Quick persuasive deception.
description: Used to distract, confuse, or pressure a target into short-term agreement.
notes: Often opposed by IQ or Will.

name: First Aid
summary: Immediate emergency care.
description: Stabilize injuries and reduce worsening conditions until proper treatment is available.
notes: Works best with proper kit and time.

name: Forgery
summary: Create or detect fake documents.
description: Produce believable counterfeit records, seals, and papers matching expected formats.
notes: Opposed by Administration, Law, or expert review.

name: Holdout
summary: Conceal items on your person.
description: Hide weapons or contraband from casual or routine searches.
notes: Search methods and clothing matter.

name: Intimidation
summary: Coerce through threats and fear.
description: Force cooperation by projecting danger, authority, or willingness to cause harm.
notes: Poor choice for long-term trust.

name: Jumping
summary: Improve leap distance and control.
description: Use for broad jumps, high jumps, and landing safely in dynamic scenes.
notes: Synergizes with Acrobatics.

name: Leadership
summary: Direct allies in stressful situations.
description: Coordinate group action, maintain morale, and issue effective commands.
notes: Best with existing authority.

name: Observation
summary: Notice details by careful watching.
description: Used for surveillance, stakeouts, and spotting subtle activity over time.
notes: Distinct from instant Perception checks.

name: Occultism
summary: Knowledge of esoteric lore and beliefs.
description: Covers myths, magical traditions, and supernatural claims whether true or false.
notes: Useful for identifying symbols and cult practices.

name: Performance
summary: Entertain an audience with practiced art.
description: Stagecraft for music, acting, dance, or showmanship aimed at pleasing viewers.
notes: Usually specialized by performance style.

name: Public Speaking
summary: Deliver clear and persuasive speeches.
description: Address crowds effectively, improving morale, persuasion, or information delivery.
notes: Works best with preparation.

name: Research
summary: Find information in records and archives.
description: Locate relevant facts efficiently in libraries, databases, and document collections.
notes: Time and source quality are key modifiers.

name: Riding
summary: Control trained mounts.
description: Mount, steer, and fight from horseback or other rideable animals.
notes: Specialty by mount type.

name: Savoir-Faire
summary: Follow etiquette for a social group.
description: Understand expected manners, titles, and protocols in specific circles.
notes: Specialized by social context.

name: Search
summary: Physically inspect areas for hidden things.
description: Systematic examination of people, rooms, and containers for concealed items.
notes: Complements Observation and Perception.

name: Stealth
summary: Move quietly and avoid detection.
description: Covers silent movement, concealment, and minimizing visual or audible clues.
notes: Opposed by Observation, Hearing, or Vision.

name: Streetwise
summary: Navigate criminal and low-status networks.
description: Find rumors, fences, and underworld contacts while avoiding obvious mistakes.
notes: Urban familiarity helps.

name: Survival
summary: Stay alive in hostile environments.
description: Find food, shelter, and safe travel methods in wilderness or severe conditions.
notes: Specialized by terrain type.

name: Swimming
summary: Move effectively in water.
description: Swim distance, tread water, and handle aquatic hazards with endurance.
notes: Armor and encumbrance penalize attempts.

name: Teaching
summary: Instruct others efficiently.
description: Communicate methods and practice plans to help students learn skills faster.
notes: Best used over downtime.

name: Thaumatology
summary: Academic theory of magic.
description: Scholarly understanding of magical principles, structures, and metaphysics.
notes: Supports magical research and analysis.

name: Tracking
summary: Follow trails and signs.
description: Identify and pursue traces left by creatures or travelers across terrain.
notes: Weather and ground conditions modify success.
